reasoning.typography: This is a browser SSL error page, not actual site typography — default system fonts with zero design consideration
reasoning.hierarchy: Error state with minimal hierarchy — just a centered error message, no actual content hierarchy to evaluate
reasoning.distinctiveness: Generic Chrome/browser error screen — could be any broken site, zero identity or personality
reasoning.color: Dark background (#2B2D30) with light text — standard browser error palette, no design intent
reasoning.density: Centered error message in vast emptiness — this is a technical failure state, not designed whitespace
reasoning.voice: ERR_SSL_PROTOCOL_ERROR — no voice, no IA, no content structure, just a broken connection

anti_patterns: Site completely inaccessible due to SSL configuration failure
No fallback or graceful degradation — total technical breakdown
Zero content visible — impossible to evaluate actual design intent
Domain exists but serves no functional purpose in current state
